message:
feat: add connector_governor and connector_lifecycle modules with property-based tests

Introduce two new modules for managing connector state machines:

- connector_governor: governs connector activation/deactivation
  decisions based on health signals, trust level, and system resource
  constraints
- connector_lifecycle: models the full lifecycle of a connector from
  discovery through registration, activation, degradation, and
  retirement

Both modules include proptest-based property tests that verify:
- State transition invariants (no invalid state sequences)
- Monotonic trust level degradation under failure
- Resource limit enforcement
- Idempotent activation/deactivation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
